info.title: Cabbo API
info.description:
Backend API for cab booking platform.

This API has **177 endpoints**.

get.description:
Verify customer's email using the provided id and token passed in the query parameters of the verification link.
This endpoint will be called when the customer clicks on the verification link sent to their email.
The customer has to be logged in to verify their email and they can only verify their own email for security reasons, 
hence the JWT token validation and check to ensure the customer can only verify their own email.

parameters.name: passenger_id

schema.description: UUID of the passenger to remove
schema.title: Passenger Id

parameters.description: UUID of the passenger to remove

parameters.name: passenger_id

schema.description: UUID of the passenger to update
schema.title: Passenger Id

parameters.description: UUID of the passenger to update

schema.title: Response List Passengers Api V1 Customer Manage Passengers  Get
Response Init Booking Api V1 Trips Initiate Booking Post

post.description: Confirm the trip booking after payment is successful.

schema.title: Response Confirm Booking Api V1 Trips Confirm Booking Post

delete.description:
Cleanup trip data for the customer.
This endpoint is invoked silently from frontend when the customer abandons the trip search or payment page midway or payment fails.

schema.title: Response Cleanup Temp Trip Booking Api V1 Trips Cleanup  Booking Id  Delete

parameters.name: booking_id

schema.description: Unique identifier for the trip booking for which the driver is being rated
schema.title: Booking Id

parameters.description: Unique identifier for the trip booking for which the driver is being rated

schema.description: Rating, feedback and overall experience for the driver for the trip

get.description: Get the review given by the current customer to a driver for a specific trip.
Fetch refund details for a specific booking.

put.summary: Update Trip Review Flag Status By Review Id
put.description: Update the flagged status of a trip review by review id. This can be used by admins to flag a review as inappropriate or fake if it violates community guidelines or is suspected to be fraudulent, and unflag a review if it was flagged by mistake or if the issue with the review has been resolved.

parameters.name: flagged

schema.description: Flag status to be updated for the trip review. Use true to flag the review as inappropriate or fake, and false to unflag the review.
schema.title: Flagged

parameters.description: Flag status to be updated for the trip review. Use true to flag the review as inappropriate or fake, and false to unflag the review.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Reason for the status change, especially important for cancellations

cancelation_detail.description: Details of the cancellation, if the trip status is changed to cancelled

dispute_detail.description: Details of the dispute to be created when the trip status is changed to dispute

extra_payment_to_driver.description: Details of any extra payment to driver at trip completion, such as tolls paid by driver, parking charges, overage payment for extra distance or time, tips from customer, etc.

start_datetime.title: Start Datetime
start_datetime.description: Actual start date and time of the trip, useful for calculating any overages in case of outstation and local trips

end_datetime.title: End Datetime
end_datetime.description: Actual end date and time of the trip, useful for calculating any overages in case of outstation and local trips

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique identifier for the cab type

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the cab type, e.g., 'sedan', 'suv', 'suv_plus'

cab_names.title: Cab Names
cab_names.description: List of cab model names for this cab type

inventory_cab_names.title: Inventory Cab Names
inventory_cab_names.description: List of actual inventory cab model names for this cab type

capacity.title: Capacity
capacity.description: Capacity of the cab type e.g., '4+1', '6+1'

created_by.title: Created By
created_by.description: The role of the user who created this cab type

is_active.title: Is Active
is_active.description: Indicates if the cab type is active or not

updated_at.title: Updated At

commented_by.title: Commented By

DisputeDetailsSchema.title: DisputeDetailsSchema
DisputeDetailsSchema.description: Structured details for different dispute types. Only relevant fields will be populated based on the dispute_type.

dispute_type.description: Type of dispute, e.g., fare, service, etc.

comments.title: Comments
comments.description: Additional comments or details between customer and support regarding the dispute

raised_by.title: Raised By
raised_by.description: User ID of the person who raised the dispute

status.description: Status of the dispute (e.g., open, resolved, rejected)

dispute_trigger.description: Description of how the dispute was triggered, e.g., 'manual', 'automatic'

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Date and time when the dispute was created

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: Date and time when the dispute was last updated

is_active.title: Is Active
is_active.description: Flag to indicate if the dispute record is active or has been soft-deleted

status.description: Updated status of the dispute (e.g., open, resolved, rejected)

details.description: Additional details about the dispute update

comment.description: Single comment to append to the dispute

earnings.title: Earnings
earnings.description: Base earnings for the trip which is the final price minus the platform fee, this is the amount that driver earns for the trip from Cabbo's end, excluding any extra earnings such as tolls paid by driver, parking charges paid by driver, overage payment for extra distance or time beyond what was estimated, tips given to driver by customer for good performance, high ratings, or completing a certain number of trips, etc.

extra_earnings.title: Extra Earnings
extra_earnings.description: Any extra earnings for the driver on top of the standard fare for the trip, such as tolls paid by driver, parking charges paid by driver, overage payment for extra distance or time beyond what was estimated, tips given to driver by customer for good performance, high ratings, or completing a certain number of trips, etc.

extra_earnings_breakdown.description: Breakdown of any extra earnings for the driver on top of the standard fare for the trip in a structured format e.g., {'toll_charges': 100, 'parking_charges': 50, 'overage_payment': 30, 'tip': 1.5}

total_earnings.title: Total Earnings
total_earnings.description: Total earnings for the driver for the trip including the standard fare and any extra earnings (earnings + extra_earnings)

toll_charges.title: Toll Charges
toll_charges.description: Toll charges paid by driver during the trip

parking_charges.title: Parking Charges
parking_charges.description: Parking charges paid by driver during the trip

overage_payment.title: Overage Payment
overage_payment.description: Overage payment to driver for extra distance or time beyond what was estimated

tips.title: Tips
tips.description: Incentive payment or tips provided to driver by customer for good performance, high ratings, or completing a certain number of trips

total_extra_payment.title: Total Extra Payment
total_extra_payment.description: Total extra payment to driver on top of final price (sum of toll_charges, parking_charges, overage_payment, and tips)

comments.title: Comments
comments.description: Additional comments or notes about the extra payment to driver

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique identifier for the fuel type

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the fuel type, e.g., 'petrol', 'diesel', 'electric'

is_active.title: Is Active
is_active.description: Indicates if the fuel type is active or not

dispute_type.description: Type of dispute, e.g., fare, service, etc.

comments.title: Comments
comments.description: Additional comments or details between customer and support regarding the dispute

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Date and time when the document record was created

last_modified.title: Last Modified
last_modified.description: Date and time when the document record was updated

created_by.title: Created By
created_by.description: User role or ID who created the document record

is_active.title: Is Active
is_active.description: Indicates if the document type is active

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique identifier for the refund transaction from the payment provider

entity_id.title: Entity Id
entity_id.description: ID of the entity for which the refund is being processed, e.g., trip ID, booking ID, etc.

policy_id.title: Policy Id
policy_id.description: ID of the refund policy that was applied for this refund, if applicable, for example, cancellation policy ID, adjustment policy ID, dispute policy ID etc. This can help us track which kind of policy was applied for this refund and also can be used for reporting and analytics purposes to see which policies are being used more frequently for refunds and also to analyze the effectiveness of different refund policies in terms of customer satisfaction, financial impact, etc.

refund_status.description: Status of the refund transaction from the payment provider, e.g., pending, completed, failed, etc.

refund_amount.title: Refund Amount
refund_amount.description: Amount to be refunded to the customer

refund_description.title: Refund Description
refund_description.description: Reason for the refund (e.g., cancellation, adjustment, etc.)

refund_details.title: Refund Details
refund_details.description: Details of the refund transaction from the payment provider

refund_initiated_datetime.title: Refund Initiated Datetime
refund_initiated_datetime.description: Date and time when the refund was initiated

refund_retried_datetime.title: Refund Retried Datetime
refund_retried_datetime.description: Date and time when the refund initiation was retried in case of a retry attempt for refund initiation if the initial refund initiation attempt failed or if we want to retry the refund initiation for any reason, we can update this field with the date and time of the retry attempt and also update the refund_status and refund_description fields accordingly to keep track of the retry attempts for refund initiation in case of failures or if we want to retry for any reason.

refund_type.description: Type of refund, e.g., full, partial, etc.

refund_provider.description: Payment provider used for processing the refund, e.g., Stripe, PayPal, etc.

refund_trigger.description: Description of how the refund was triggered, e.g., 'manual', 'automatic'

alt_region_names.title: Alt Region Names
alt_region_names.description: List of alternative names for the region

country_code.title: Country Code
country_code.description: ISO country code the region belongs to, e.g., 'IN' for India

country_name.title: Country Name
country_name.description: Name of the country the region belongs to, e.g., 'India'

state_code.title: State Code
state_code.description: ISO state code the region belongs to, e.g., 'KA' for Karnataka

state_name.title: State Name
state_name.description: Name of the state the region belongs to, e.g., 'Karnataka'

country_id.title: Country Id
country_id.description: UUID of the country this region belongs to

state_id.title: State Id
state_id.description: UUID of the state this region belongs to

trip_types.title: Trip Types
trip_types.description: List of supported trip types in the region

fuel_types.title: Fuel Types
fuel_types.description: List of supported fuel types in the region

car_types.title: Car Types
car_types.description: List of supported car types in the region

airport_locations.title: Airport Locations
airport_locations.description: Dictionary of airport locations with details like display name, lat, lng, place_id, address

is_serviceable.title: Is Serviceable
is_serviceable.description: Indicates if the region is enabled for operations

alt_region_names.title: Alt Region Names
alt_region_names.description: List of alternative names for the region

trip_types.title: Trip Types
trip_types.description: List of supported trip types in the region

fuel_types.title: Fuel Types
fuel_types.description: List of supported fuel types in the region

car_types.title: Car Types
car_types.description: List of supported car types in the region

airport_locations.title: Airport Locations
airport_locations.description: Dictionary of airport locations with details like display name, lat, lng, place_id, address

state_code.title: State Code
state_code.description: ISO state code, e.g., 'KA' for Karnataka

country_name.title: Country Name
country_name.description: Name of the country the state belongs to, e.g., 'India'

country_code.title: Country Code
country_code.description: ISO country code the state belongs to, e.g., 'IN' for India

country_id.title: Country Id
country_id.description: UUID of the country this state belongs to

regions.title: Regions
regions.description: List of regions within the state

is_serviceable.title: Is Serviceable
is_serviceable.description: Indicates if the state is serviceable for operations

state_code.title: State Code
state_code.description: ISO state code, e.g., 'KA' for Karnataka

cab_cleanliness.title: Cab Cleanliness
cab_cleanliness.description: Rating for the cleanliness of the cab, on a scale of 1 to 5, where 1 is very poor and 5 is excellent

ac_working.title: Ac Working
ac_working.description: Indicates whether the air conditioning in the cab was working properly

driving_behavior.title: Driving Behavior
driving_behavior.description: Rating for the driver's driving behavior, on a scale of 1 to 5, where 1 is very poor and 5 is excellent

punctuality.title: Punctuality
punctuality.description: Rating for the driver's punctuality, on a scale of 1 to 5, where 1 is very poor and 5 is excellent

overall_cab_condition.title: Overall Cab Condition
overall_cab_condition.description: Rating for the overall condition of the cab, on a scale of 1 to 5, where 1 is very poor and 5 is excellent

other_comments.title: Other Comments
other_comments.description: Any additional comments or feedback about the trip experience

trip_type.description: Trip type for which the package is applicable, e.g., local, hourly rental, etc.

region_code.title: Region Code
region_code.description: Region code for which the trip package is applicable, e.g., MUM for Mumbai, DEL for Delhi, etc. This is required to ensure that the package is created for a valid region and to avoid any confusion while applying the package to a trip during booking.

included_hours.title: Included Hours
included_hours.description: Number of hours included in the trip package, e.g., 4, 6, 8, 10, 12

included_km.title: Included Km
included_km.description: Number of kilometers included in the trip package, e.g., 40, 60, 80, 100, 120

driver_allowance.title: Driver Allowance
driver_allowance.description: Optional driver allowance for the package, this will apply for trip packages where duration of ride>=12hrs

id.title: Id
id.description: ID of the trip package to be updated

included_hours.title: Included Hours
included_hours.description: Number of hours included in the trip package, e.g., 4, 6, 8, 10, 12

included_km.title: Included Km
included_km.description: Number of kilometers included in the trip package, e.g., 40, 60, 80, 100, 120

driver_allowance.title: Driver Allowance
driver_allowance.description: Optional driver allowance for the package, this will apply for trip packages where duration of ride>=12hrs

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: Rating given by the customer for the trip on a scale of 1 to 5

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Optional review or feedback provided by the customer about the trip

overall_experience.description: Overall experience of the trip as rated by the customer, including ratings for cab cleanliness, AC working condition, driving behavior, punctuality, overall cab condition, and any additional comments or feedback about the trip experience

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: Rating given by the customer for the trip on a scale of 1 to 5

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Optional review or feedback provided by the customer about the trip

overall_experience.description: Overall experience of the trip as rated by the customer, including ratings for cab cleanliness, AC working condition, driving behavior, punctuality, overall cab condition, and any additional comments or feedback about the trip experience

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique identifier for the trip rating record

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when the trip rating was created

given_by.description: Details of the customer who gave the rating, including their name and profile picture URL

alternate_customer_phone.title: Alternate Customer Phone
alternate_customer_phone.description: Alternate phone number for the customer, in case they want to be contacted on a different number for this trip

special_needs_requests.title: Special Needs Requests
special_needs_requests.description: Any special needs or requests from the customer regarding the trip, such as wheelchair accessibility, child seat requirement, etc.

placard_name.title: Placard Name
placard_name.description: Placard name for the trip, only applied if placard_required is already True on the trip
